summary: Updated the project setup documentation and CI/package Dockerfiles to use a newer Discord-hosted compiler archive URL, changing references from MELEE_COMPILERS.zip at the old attachment ID to MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip at the new attachment ID. The PR body notes this needed to merge before PR #958 so Docker images could be updated against the correct compiler package.
what_changed: Replaced the Windows setup README compiler archive link from https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/727909624342380615/1079286377230909440/MELEE_COMPILERS.zip to https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/727909624342380615/1129879865433264158/MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip.
Updated the PowerShell setup snippet in .github/README.md so $url points at the new MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip archive.
Updated the Linux setup README download link to the new compiler archive URL while keeping the displayed link text as MELEE_COMPILERS.zip.
Changed MELEE_COMPILERS_URL in .github/packages/build-linux/Dockerfile to the new MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip URL.
Changed MELEE_COMPILERS_URL in .github/packages/build-windows/Dockerfile to the new MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip URL.
smart_moves: Kept documentation and Docker image build inputs in sync by updating both human setup instructions and automated package Dockerfiles in the same PR.
Used the existing MELEE_COMPILERS_URL environment variable in Dockerfiles rather than changing setup scripts or Docker build flow, minimizing blast radius.
Merged this as a small prerequisite change before PR #958, according to the PR body, so dependent Docker image updates could consume the correct compiler archive.
decomp_lessons: Toolchain archive URLs are decomp-critical infrastructure: stale compiler downloads can block local matching work and CI/package image rebuilds even when source code is unchanged.
When compiler package locations change, update every entry point that provisions the compilers: README manual setup, shell/PowerShell snippets, Linux Dockerfiles, and Windows Dockerfiles.
Prefer small, isolated infrastructure PRs for toolchain URL changes so later Docker or build-system PRs are not mixed with dependency-location fixes.
naming_conventions: The extracted GameCube compiler directory is expected under tools/mwcc_compiler/.
Docker setup uses the environment variable name MELEE_COMPILERS_URL for the compiler archive download location.
The new archive filename in the URL is MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip, replacing the older MELEE_COMPILERS.zip URL target.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No direct assembly or function-matching tactic was present in this PR.
Indirect matching relevance: ensuring the correct mwcc compiler archive is downloaded preserves the expected compiler toolchain needed for reproducible builds and decomp matching.
review_feedback: No issue comments or review comments were included in the provided PR context.
One review is recorded, but no review body or actionable feedback was available in the slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that reference MELEE_COMPILERS_N.zip or update MELEE_COMPILERS_URL.
Check PR #958 to see how the Docker image update depended on this compiler archive URL change.
Search for any remaining stale references to the old 1079286377230909440/MELEE_COMPILERS.zip URL.
